name: IRC_LI_RSC_BATCH_HISTORY
description: Stores the history of batch calls that were made as part of LinkedIn RSC integration

columns.Name: BATCH_ID
columns.Comments: Primary Key of the table. System generated.

columns.Name: ENTITY_TYPE_CODE
columns.Comments: Indicates the type of ORC entity. The corresponding lookup type is ORA_IRC_LI_RSC_ENTITY_TYPE

columns.Name: ACTION_CODE
columns.Comments: Action to be excuted by the sync. The corresponding lookup type is ORA_IRC_LI_RSC_ACTION

columns.Name: BATCH_COUNT
columns.Comments: Stores the number of records sent in the batch

columns.Name: PAYLOAD
columns.Comments: The payload sent to LinkedIn RSC.

columns.Name: RESPONSE_PAYLOAD
columns.Comments: The payload received from LinkedIn RSC.

columns.Name: URL
columns.Comments: The url used when sending to LinkedIn RSC.

columns.Name: STATUS_CODE
columns.Comments: The status of this sync action. The corresponding lookup type is ORA_IRC_LI_RSC_SYNC_STATUS

columns.Name: METHOD
columns.Comments: Http method that used in the request.

columns.Name: REQUEST_HEADERS
columns.Comments: Http request headers that is used here.

columns.Name: RESPONSE_STATUS_CODE
columns.Comments: Http status code of http response.

columns.Name: STATUS_MESSAGE
columns.Comments: Http status message that is returned in response.

columns.Name: RESPONSE_HEADERS
columns.Comments: Http response headers returned from the response.

columns.Name: REQUEST_START_TIME
columns.Comments: The time that the http request started.

columns.Name: REQUEST_END_TIME
columns.Comments: The time that the http request ended.

columns.Name: ESS_REQUEST_ID
columns.Comments: Ess Job ID, the ess request ID of the job.

columns.Name: PROCESSED_DATE
columns.Comments: Indicates the date and time when the batch call was made to LinkedIn.

columns.Name: CREATION_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the creation of the row.

columns.Name: CREATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who created the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the last update of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the session login associated to the user who last updated the row.
